          {motive : (a a_1 : CT7.Graph.NodeId) → CT7.Graph.Path S capability ctx input a a_1 → Sort u} →

                ((node : CT7.Graph.NodeId) → motive node node (CT7.Graph.Path.nil node)) →
                  ({a b c : CT7.Graph.NodeId} →
                      (a_2 : CT7.Graph.Edge S capability ctx input a b) →
                        (a_3 : CT7.Graph.Path S capability ctx input b c) → motive a c (CT7.Graph.Path.cons a_2 a_3)) →
                    motive a a_1 t
